text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian takes first place and the Spring
Shield is hers!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If I didn't muster all my strength, I wouldn't
have won.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! As expected, you were so cool out
there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Nice win against Rice Shower! You looked
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I lost.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: E-eek!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't listen to any of that racket. No matter what
people say about you, don't let your strength
waver.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. You're a nice person.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I'm not going to let it end here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because... there are people that I want to make
happy someday.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! Do your best in the next one too!
Don't lose!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian!
Briaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower! You can win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks... I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...She's strong.
choice_data_list: This means we've got to get stronger too.
This means we've got to get stronger too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Raw strength alone doesn't qualify someone to
stand where we're standing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We need to keep climbing... to the very top of
the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From now on, the top means the fierce races of
the Senior Autumn Triple Crown, a whole
different level from the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The top races in the senior year are the autumn
Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup—where the world's
fiercest compete—and the Arima Kinen, the
year-end Grand Prix.
choice_data_list:
How does the Senior Autumn Triple Crown
sound?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...If that's where the strength I'm searching for is,
just say the word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our sights on the Senior Autumn
Triple Crown's first battle—the autumn Tenno
Sho.
